exitSurvey_feedback: No issues at all, but I was timed out one time because the person did not type fast enough in the second phase. By the time they were finished typing, there was about  1 or 2 seconds left. In the future, maybe you can have the person type out what they want before the timer starts, on the page before, or give them 10 seconds, then start the timer for the others to pick the shape and if they were a part of the original group or not!
exitSurvey_strength: My strategy was to describe the items as my team did. I was not the first to call a shape by a name, so I just used the same words my teammates used  to describe the items. This way they knew we were all on the same page, and could identify each other later in the game.
